required_traits: blank reusable UI bases without baked text or icons
chunky voxel mining fantasy material language
dark stone or amethyst panels with copper/gold bevel accents
clear gutters and isolated component shadows
forbidden_mixes: baked labels, fake letters, numbers, or watermarks
icons fused into button or card backgrounds
decorative center medallions inside stretch zones
cyan key-color holes or connected component shadows

assets.intended_role: Mine Cards blank UI base source sheet for board panels, node cards, activity chips, and primary buttons
assets.observed_subject: Eight isolated blank carved-stone UI bases on cyan chroma: mechanics panel, premium upgrade panel, default/selected node cards, active/idle activity chips, disabled/active primary buttons.
problems: accepted as a source sheet only; runtime/final-art still requires slice9 crop manifest, content safe areas, stretched previews, pixel audit, and native screenshot proof
progress bars are intentionally excluded from this accepted candidate and still need a separate source or retained scaffold
